event.description:
We’re starting the year on a high note with our partners at Microsoft Reactor! This is a joint meetup with Bay Area AI:

https://www.meetup.com/bay-area-ai/events/267812020/

We’re looking for talks — propose one! Also we’re looking for food, drink and recording sponsors — contact Alexy at ByTheBay.io to help.
event.title: Kicking off 2020 at Microsoft Reactor
